title: Compliance: python/l2_payload.py dispatch byte
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.1. File: python/src/lichen/l2_payload.py. Status: COMPLIANT. Lines 32-36 explicitly check payload[0] == L2_DISPATCH_SCHC (0x14) and payload[0] == L2_DISPATCH_ROUTING (0x15) before classifying payload type.
